events.name: Graduate Research Mixer
events.description: Join us for an evening of networking with fellow graduate researchers, faculty mentors, and industry guests. Present your work in a relaxed setting, discover collaboration opportunities, and meet the GSA team over light refreshments. All graduate students and programs welcome.

events.name: Academic Success Workshop
events.description: A hands-on workshop covering thesis and dissertation writing strategies, time management for graduate students, navigating NJIT academic resources, and communicating with advisors. Led by graduate advisors and the Office of Graduate Studies. Bring your current challenges — this session is interactive and Q&A-driven.

events.name: International Graduate Student Q&A
events.description: Open Q&A session for international graduate students covering F-1/J-1 visa regulations, OPT and CPT applications, on-campus employment rules, Social Security applications, and NJIT's Office of Global Initiatives services. Representatives from International Student Services and the Graduate Financial Aid office will be present.

events.name: Coffee with GSA
events.description: Drop in for our informal monthly coffee hour! Chat directly with GSA officers, share concerns, suggest new ideas, and learn about upcoming events and initiatives. No agenda, no pressure — just a good conversation over coffee. Light refreshments provided by GSA.

events.name: Career Networking Night
events.description: Connect with NJIT alumni, recruiters, and industry professionals from STEM, finance, and tech sectors. Graduate students are encouraged to bring printed resumes and business cards. Career Development Center advisors will be available for on-the-spot resume reviews. Dress business casual. Co-hosted by the NJIT Career Development Center.
